from flask import Flask, Response
import csv
import io

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route("/export/users")
def export_users():
    db = get_db()
    rows = db.execute("SELECT id, name, email, address, phone FROM users").fetchall()
    output = io.StringIO()
    writer = csv.writer(output)
    writer.writerow(["id", "name", "email", "address", "phone"])
    for row in rows:
        writer.writerow([row["id"], row["name"], row["email"], row["address"], row["phone"]])
    return Response(output.getvalue(), mimetype="text/csv")

@app.route("/export/logs")
def export_logs():
    log_entries = []
    for i in range(500000):
        log_entries.append(f"2024-01-01 00:00:00 INFO Request {i} processed\n")
    return Response("".join(log_entries), mimetype="text/plain")
